description: Designed for lightweight comfort, the nike men's Avid Skate shoes will match the enthusiasm of the hard-core skater. Whether you’re pounding the pavement on your board or shuffling off to class, you’ll be looking good in the classic, streamlined style of these nike Avid Skate shoes. Upper Made with a breathable leather upper Cushy footbed and a lightweight rubber outsole Protective overlays for increased durability Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Rubber taping on midsole for extra durability Padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with lightweight rubber shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
